Prototype capture; not live Databricks proof. Export brief Present mode POSTURE 87.4% 9.0 pts QoQ THE STATE OF FINANCE_PROD 1,247 of 1,427 productionized assets meet baseline policy. Coverage is up 9 points this quarter - on track to hit the 90% Q2 target by week 30. CERTIFIED ASSETS 1,247 +82 this quarter OPEN EXPOSURES 7 3 require Compliance review CDES TRACKED 42 Prototype registry fixture WHAT CHANGED TODAY Coverage 86.8% 87.4% +12 newly certified Quality SLA 94.1% 94.3% 3 expectations passing High-risk exposures 9 7 2 mitigated by Steward team Lineage coverage 98.6% 98.6% No regressions GOVERNANCE COVERAGE 87% +2.1 pts vs last week CERTIFIED ASSETS 612 +37 this week OPEN STEWARDSHIP ITEMS 184 -11 this week HIGH-RISK EXPOSURES 7 +2 new this week Coverage trend · last 12 weeks i Share of productionized assets meeting baseline policy 12w 26w 52w SLA 90% W14 W16 W18 W20 W22 W24 W25 +9.0 pts over the last 12 weeks SLA: >=90% by end of Q2 Projected: 91.2% by W30 Posture by domain i Coverage x certified asset count Revenue & Sales 92% 138 cert Customer 84% 17
